Capital on Tap's website (https://www.capitalontap.com/us) is currently inaccessible due to Cloudflare security restrictions that block automated access. The ASN associated with this research attempt has been banned from the domain, preventing retrieval of company information, service offerings, terms, or operational details.

Without access to primary source material from the company's website, a factual profile cannot be constructed. Creating descriptions, pros, cons, or service lists based on assumptions or external sources would violate the requirement to build profiles exclusively on verified website content.

Based on the current category assignment (business-loans), Capital on Tap appears positioned in the small business financing space. However, this categorization cannot be confirmed without reviewing their actual website content and service descriptions.

To complete this profile accurately, direct website access must be restored, or alternative verified sources (SEC filings, press releases, terms of service documents) would be needed. Recommending manual review of the company's website or contacting them directly for current information.
